title: Throat Exercise
subtitle: Anti-snoring oropharyngeal training
discardConfirm: Are you sure you want to discard this training session?

tongue_slide.name: Tongue Slide
tongue_slide.desc: Place tongue tip behind upper front teeth, slowly slide backward along the palate
tongue_slide.tip: Keep the tip pressed firmly, go as slowly as possible

tongue_push_up.name: Tongue Push Up
tongue_push_up.desc: Press your entire tongue flat against the roof of your mouth

tongue_push_down.name: Tongue Push Down
tongue_push_down.desc: Touch lower front teeth with tongue tip, press tongue flat against mouth floor
tongue_push_down.tip: Keep jaw relaxed, only use tongue force

tongue_stretch.name: Tongue Stretch
tongue_stretch.desc: Stick your tongue out as far as possible, try to touch your chin
tongue_stretch.tip: Tilt head up for better effect

tongue_curl.name: Tongue Curl
tongue_curl.desc: Curl your tongue into a tube shape and hold
tongue_curl.tip: If you can't curl, try bringing tongue sides toward center

vowel_pronounce.name: Vowel Pronounce
vowel_pronounce.desc: Say A-E-I-O-U with exaggerated mouth movements
vowel_pronounce.tip: Stretch each vowel, make mouth movements as big as possible

say_ah.name: Palate Lift
say_ah.desc: Open mouth wide and say 'ahh' to lift the soft palate
say_ah.tip: Watch in mirror if the uvula lifts

jaw_open_close.name: Jaw Open Close
jaw_open_close.desc: Purse lips then slowly open mouth wide, then slowly close

jaw_side_to_side.name: Jaw Side to Side
jaw_side_to_side.desc: Slowly move your jaw to the left, then to the right
jaw_side_to_side.tip: Keep range moderate, feel the jaw muscle stretch

cheek_hook.name: Cheek Hook
cheek_hook.desc: Hook finger to pull cheek outward, use facial muscles to pull it back
cheek_hook.tip: Do one set for each side

lip_purse.name: Lip Purse
lip_purse.desc: Purse your lips tightly as if whistling, hold with force
lip_purse.tip: Feel the tightness in lips and cheeks

throat_humming.name: Throat Humming
throat_humming.desc: Close mouth and make a sustained humming sound
throat_humming.tip: Feel the vibration in your throat, keep it steady

tiger_yell.name: Silent Roar
tiger_yell.desc: Open mouth as wide as possible as if yelling, but make no sound
tiger_yell.tip: Feel maximum stretch in throat and jaw

balloon_breathing.name: Balloon Breathing
balloon_breathing.desc: Inhale through nose, exhale forcefully through mouth as if inflating a balloon
balloon_breathing.tip: Puff cheeks while blowing, keep airflow steady

restDesc: Relax, prepare for the next exercise
notePlaceholder: Record how you feel about this training...
scienceDesc: Clinically proven oropharyngeal exercises that reduce snoring after 8-12 weeks
recommendFreq: Recommended: twice daily, morning and evening
